agent_feed.message: Initiating Aegis Comm Link and syncing Phase 2 Execution Gate.
Missing null safety on activeHistoryPoints. Cannot proceed.
Massive prop bloat detected. 8 unused properties drilled from parent component. Missing TypeScript interface for ProfileTrendsTabProps.
Applied TS interfaces. Cleared 8 props from AssociateProfileModal.tsx. Replaced activeHistoryPoints mapping with robust optional chaining.
Typecheck and Test suite passes. E2E locators present. Approving Phase 3 transition.
Phase 2 Execution Gate initiated for ProfileTrophiesTab.tsx. Spawning QA and Tech Debt agents.
Null Safety Trap: employee.trophies will crash if employee is undefined before hydration completes. Missing data-testids.
Missing TS interfaces for ProfileTrophiesTabProps. getIcon parameter is implicitly any.

Refactored ProfileTrophiesTab.tsx. Typed props with local interfaces, applied optional chaining to employee state, eradicated raw hex colors for design tokens, mapped array keys, and inserted data-testids.
Null traps eliminated. Playwright E2E locators are present. Quality Gate 100% SUCCESS. Proceeding.
Phase 2 Execution Gate initiated for AuraActionCard.tsx. Spawning QA and Tech Debt agents.
Missing TS Interfaces (Rule 16). employee is typed as 'any'. Missing cursor-pointer class on button (Rule 5).
Async Race Condition: Coach Now button not disabled while isScanning. Missing data-testids. Null Pointer Risk on employee.
Refactored AuraActionCard.tsx. Applied Employee interfaces, eradicated implicit any types, injected component hydration guards, fixed async coaching logic, and attached data-testids.
Race conditions and null traps removed. Types are strict. Playwright locators verified. 100% Quality Gate pass.

Massive inline style bloat violating index.css tokens. Missing TS interfaces.
Null safety traps. Division by zero crashes. Missing Playwright data-testids.
Refactored GoalsSlide.tsx. Eradicated raw style elements. Mapped to premium tokens (--bg-obsidian). Added TS interface MetricGoal. Eliminated division by zero risk.
Math checks out. TestIDs injected correctly. 100% Quality Gate pass.
Phase 2 Execution Gate initiated for LeaderboardSlide.tsx. Spawning QA and Tech Debt agents.
Premium Design Tokens violation (Rule 7 & 10). Missing TS interface (Rule 16). Missing component hydration guards (Rule 18).
CRITICAL - Null Safety Trap on topAdvisors. Missing data-testids. CSS Boy Scout violation.
Refactored LeaderboardSlide.tsx. Replaced inline styles with Tailwind + CSS variables. Added Employee array type. Added guard clause for empty arrays to prevent crashes.
Array hydration bounds verified. Test IDs present. Quality Gate Passed.

Styling Mandate Violations. TypeScript any Violations. Null-Safety Risk on name.charAt. React Keys Anti-Pattern.
Null Safety Trap on mapping. Null Safety Trap on name.charAt. Missing Test IDs. Style Mandate Violation.
Refactored WinsSlide.tsx. Added WinRecord interface. Replaced React array keys with ids. Safe property access for null fields. Replaced inline styles with utility tokens.
Safe access and array hydration bounds verified. Test IDs present. Quality Gate Passed.

Refactored CustomScenarioForm.tsx and CustomScenariosTab.tsx. Addressed Tech Debt Analyst VETO for any typings, missing TS interfaces, and inline style mandates. Verified via Quality Gate (100% Pass). Moving files to processed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for DepartmentTargetsTab.tsx. Fixed QA and Tech Debt VETOs: Eradicated inline styles, migrated state to useStore instead of prop drilling, enforced TS safety, and added data-testids. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for SupervisorProfilesTab.tsx. Fixed all VETOs: Migrated managers and storePin state from prop-drilling to useStore. Replaced inline styles with Tailwind tokens. Added TS types and data-testids. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for SystemPromptsTab.tsx. Fixed all VETOs: Eradicated prop-drilling by extracting state from Zustand, resolved a fatal React crash on object children, eradicated inline styles with premium Tailwind CSS utility tokens, and added test-ids. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for RentsDueUploader.tsx. Fixed all VETOs: Eradicated unused prop-drilling, applied TS interfaces, resolved null safety and async race conditions, applied CSS tokens, and injected data-testids. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Fixed all VETOs: Eradicated god-object prop-drilling by moving 17 props of localized state from RoleplayCenterPage down into RoleplayActiveSession. Replaced inline styles with Tailwind utility classes. Added test-ids and resolved null-safety loops. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for RoleplayConfiguration.tsx. Fixed all VETOs: Eradicated inline styles, injected TS interfaces, removed redundant prop-drilling, fixed race conditions with launch button, and resolved null-safety loops. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for RoleplayResults.tsx. Fixed all VETOs: Eradicated inline styles, injected strict TS interfaces (RoleplayResultsProps), fixed missing test-ids, added null safety guard (loader on !evaluation), fixed nested optional chaining, and resolved unused saveAndReturn prop by replacing with native React Router useNavigate. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for useRosterImporter.ts. Refactored state updates for functional mapping, added ParsedEmployeeRow TS interface, improved null safety on file parse, prevented async React unmounted state update trap via isMounted ref, fixed FUZZY_MAP key indexing type errors, and resolved type mismatches in modal. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for RosterDisplaySettings.tsx. Fixed all VETOs: Eradicated inline styles, injected strict TS interfaces (VisibleCols, RosterDisplaySettingsProps), added data-testids, added null safety check for Object.keys, and resolved typing mismatch with useStoreRoster hook. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for RosterMetricCell.tsx. Fixed Tech Debt VETO: Extracted duplicated utility functions getMetricClass, getPaceText, and getEmployeeGap to src/utils/rosterUtils.ts with strict TS types. Removed prop drilling of deptGoals. Added data-testids and null safety per QA. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for StartNewPeriodForm.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Refactored out all inline styles, added strictly typed props, removed prop-drilling by placing state locally, added data-testids, added error state for form validation instead of window.alert, added cursor-pointer. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for StoreRosterHeader.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Refactored arbitrary inline styles into Tailwind tokens, grouped 13 drilled props into typed toggles and actions objects, added data-testids to all interactive elements, added null-safe DEPARTMENTS fallback. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for StoreRosterMobileCard.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Refactored out all inline styles to use Tailwind tokens, added strictly typed props via Employee interface, added data-testids to all interactive elements and mapping iterations, removed unused drilled props from StoreRosterPage, added null-chaining guards. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for StoreRosterTable.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Defined strictly typed StoreRosterTableProps to remove implicit any, deleted unused props and unused imports, removed unused Zustand selectors, added data-testids to table container, th elements, and empty state, and added null-safety to visibleCols. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for StoreRosterTableRow.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Refactored props to extract visibleCols, deptGoals, rosterHistory, activePeriod directly via useStore selectors instead of prop drilling. Resolved inline IIFE anti-pattern by extracting CVI calculation to useMemo. Fixed null safety trap for cvi string evaluation and getEmployeeGap split array. Added missing data-testids to table row and interactive elements. Enforced cursor-pointer styling rule. Typecheck and tests 100% SUCCESS.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for ActionSheet.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Replaced inline styles on h3 with tailwind classes. Added cursor-pointer to action-sheet-overlay and added data-testids. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for DraggableAssociate.tsx. Resolved QA VETOs: Replaced sprawling inline style block with custom classNames and Tailwind equivalents. Implemented optional chaining and null fallbacks for Employee data properties. Added cursor-pointer to all interactive buttons. Added missing data-testids for Playwright testing. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for DroppableZone.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Replaced sprawling inline style block with custom Tailwind utility string. Implemented strict null-checking for string replace on id. Added missing Playwright data-testids. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for ZoneGrid.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Refactored component to extract activeShift data (zoneAssignments, activeBreaks) directly via Zustand useStore to resolve Rule #13 prop-drilling violation. Added ZoneGridProps interface to eliminate implicit any types. Replaced manual fallbacks with empty default constants to preserve React useShallow equality. Added missing Playwright data-testids. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for ZoneTimeline.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Defined proper TypeScript interfaces. Refactored state access to use Zustand useStore for global entities (activeShift, activePeriod, rosterHistory). Replaced inline styles with class names referencing premium design tokens. Extracted the derived data loops into a useMemo to prevent O(n*m) render loops. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for AddEmployeeModal.tsx. Resolved Tech Debt & QA VETOs: Added comprehensive Playwright data-testids. Added isSubmitting guards for asynchronous race conditions. Fixed React lifecycle issue by introducing handleClose for modal cleanup. Hoisted constant DEPARTMENTS array to prevent re-instantiation. Added missing cursor-pointer classes for mobile touch mapping. Quality Gate 100% passed.

Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for AdvisorLogin.tsx. Resolved QA & Tech Debt VETOs: Fixed memory leak by extracting EMPTY_ROSTER. Fixed async store ID sync race conditions. Phase 2 Execution Gate completed for AssociateProfileModal.tsx. QA and Tech Debt VETOs resolved: Refactored useAssociateProfile into modular hooks/Tab state, removed prop-drilling, added missing Test IDs and proper null-checks. Quality Gate 100% passed.

umber[], replaced all inline styles with Tailwind utility classes, added data-testid attributes. Quality Gate 100% passed.
